user_query: I'm planning a hiking trip to Yosemite National Park. Can you provide me with the nearest alternative fuel stations within a 20-mile radius of the park? Additionally, give me the latitude and longitude of Yosemite.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the latitude and longitude of Yosemite National Park.
Find the nearest alternative fuel stations within a 20-mile radius of the geographical coordinates obtained from step 1.
